name: Chocolate Truffle Cake # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease bottom of 8-inch springform pan.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Melt chocolate and butter over very low heat. Add flour, sugar, and water, mixing well.
5. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating mixture well after each addition.
6. Fold in beaten egg whites.
7. Pour into prepared pan and bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
8. Let cool, refrigerate for at least a few hours to set.
9. Whip cream and spread over cake.
10. Best to cut while cold, then let stand at room temperature for about 15 minutes before serving.
